lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Have you got rid of the ghost yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't find Father Urhney at the moment.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Well, you can get to the swamp he lives in by going south through the cemetery.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: You'll have to go right into the far western depths of the swamp, near the coastline. That is where his house is.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Welcome to the church of holy Saradomin.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for a quest.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: That's lucky, I need someone to do a quest for me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, let me help then.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Thank you. The problem is, there is a ghost in the church graveyard. I would like you to get rid of it.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: If you need any help, my friend Father Urhney is an expert on ghosts.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: I believe he is currently living as a hermit in Lumbridge swamp. He has a little shack in the far west of the swamps.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Exit the graveyard through the south gate to reach the swamp. I'm sure if you told him that I sent you he'd be willing to help.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: My name is Father Aereck by the way. Pleased to meet you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Likewise.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Take care travelling through the swamps, I have heard they can be quite dangerous.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't have time right now.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Oh well. If you do have some spare time on your hands, come back and talk to me.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Have you got rid of the ghost yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I had a talk with Father Urhney. He has given me this funny amulet to talk to the ghost with.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: I always wondered what that amulet was... Well, I hope it's useful. Tell me when you get rid of the ghost!

sections.title: If the ghostspeak amulet is ever lost

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: Go away! I'm meditating!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the Amulet of Ghostspeak.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: What are you talking about? I can see you've got it with you!

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: You come here wasting my time... Has it even occurred to you that you've got it stored somewhere? Now GO AWAY!

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: How careless can you get? Those things aren't easy to come by you know! Now clear some space in your inventory and I'll give you another one.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: How careless can you get? Those things aren't easy to come by you know! It's a good job I've got a spare.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: Be more careful this time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll try to be.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: Go away! I'm meditating!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, that's friendly.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: I SAID go AWAY.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, okay... sheesh, what a grouch.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Father Aereck sent me to talk to you.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: I suppose I'd better talk to you then. What problems has he got himself into this time?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He's got a ghost haunting his graveyard.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: Oh, the silly fool.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: I leave town for just five months, and ALREADY he can't manage.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: (sigh)

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: Well, I can't go back and exorcise it. I vowed not to leave this place. Until I had done a full two years of prayer and meditation.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: Tell you what I can do though; take this amulet.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: It is an Amulet of Ghostspeak.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: So called, because when you wear it you can speak to ghosts. A lot of ghosts are doomed to be ghosts because they have left some important task uncompleted.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: Maybe if you know what this task is, you can get rid of the ghost. I'm not making any guarantees mind you, but it is the best I can do right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you. I'll give it a try!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mean he gets himself into lots of problems?

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: Yeah. For example, when we were trainee priests he kept on getting stuck up bell ropes.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: Anyway. I don't have time for chitchat. What's his problem THIS time?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He's got a ghost haunting his graveyard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've come to repossess your house.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: Under what grounds???

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Repeated failure on mortgage repayments.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: But... I don't have a mortgage! I built this house myself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry. I must have got the wrong address. All the houses look the same around here.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: What? What houses? What ARE you talking about???

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know. I just wanted this house...

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: Oh... go away and stop wasting my time!

sections.title: Without wearing the Amulet of Ghostspeak

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello ghost, how are you?

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Wooo wooo wooooo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't speak ghost.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Woo woo?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope, still don't understand you.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: WOOOOOOOOO!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ooh, THAT'S interesting.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Woo wooo. Woooooooooooooooooo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Did he really?

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Woo.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: My brother had EXACTLY the same problem.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Woo Wooooo!

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Wooooo Woo woo woo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You'll have to give me the recipe some time...

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Wooooooo woo woooooooo.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... I'm not so sure about that.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Wooo woo?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, if you INSIST.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Wooooooooo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah well, better be off now...

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Woo.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, that's what I thought.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Wooo woooooooooooooo...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye. Thanks for the chat.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Wooo wooo?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... I'm not so sure about that.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Wooo woo?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, if you INSIST.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Wooooooooo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah well, better be off now...

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Woo.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any hints where I can find some treasure?

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Wooooooo woo! Wooooo woo wooooo woowoowoo woo Woo wooo. Wooooo woo woo? Woooooooooooooooooo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't speak ghost.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Woo woo?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope, still don't understand you.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: WOOOOOOOOO!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you. You've been very helpful.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Wooooooo.

sections.title: While wearing the Amulet of Ghostspeak

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello ghost, how are you?

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Not very good actually.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the problem then?

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Did you just understand what I said???

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yep, now tell me what the problem is.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: WOW! This is INCREDIBLE! I didn't expect anyone to ever understand me again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, Ok, I can understand you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But have you any idea WHY you're doomed to be a ghost?

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Well, to be honest... I'm not sure.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've been told a certain task may need to be completed so you can rest in peace.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: I should think it is probably because a warlock has come along and stolen my skull. If you look inside my coffin there, you'll find my corpse without a head on it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know where this warlock might be now?

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: I think it was one of the warlocks who lives in the big tower by the sea south-west from here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok. I will try and get the skull back for you, then you can rest in peace.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Ooh, thank you. That would be such a great relief!

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: It is so dull being a ghost...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, you sound like you're speaking nonsense to me.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Oh that's a pity. You got my hopes up there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, it is a pity. Sorry about that.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Hang on a second... you CAN understand me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No I can't.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Great. The first person I can speak to in ages...and they're a moron.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yep, clever aren't I?

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: I'm impressed. You must be very powerful. I don't suppose you can stop me being a ghost?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, ok. Do you know WHY you're a ghost?

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Nope. I just know I can't do much of anything like this!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, you're scary!

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Great.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: The first person I can speak to in ages...

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: ..and they're an idiot.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, this amulet works!

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Oh! It's your amulet that's doing it! I did wonder. I don't suppose you can help me? I don't like being a ghost.

sections.title: Talking to the Restless ghost again with the amulet of ghostspeak

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello ghost, how are you?

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: How are you doing finding my skull?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I can't find it at the moment.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Ah well. Keep on looking.

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: I'm pretty sure it's somewhere in the tower south-west from here. There's a lot of levels to the tower, though. I suppose it might take a little while to find.

sections.title: Talking to the Restless ghost again without the amulet of ghostspeak

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello ghost, how are you?

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Wooo wooo wooooo!

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Have you got rid of the ghost yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've found out that the ghost's corpse has lost its skull. If I can find the skull, the ghost should leave.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: That WOULD explain it.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Hmmmmm. Well, I haven't seen any skulls.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I think a warlock has stolen it.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: I hate warlocks.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Ah well, good luck!

sections.title: Talking to Father Aereck with the skull

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Have you got rid of the ghost yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've finally found the ghost's skull!

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Great! Put it in the ghost's coffin and see what happens!

sections.title: Using the skull on the closed coffin

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello ghost, how are you?

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: How are you doing finding my skull?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have found it!

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Hurrah! Now I can stop being a ghost! You just need to put it in my coffin there, then I'll be free!

sections.title: Using the skull on the Restless ghost

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: If you just put it in my coffin that should do the trick...

sections.title: Putting the skull in the coffin

lines.speaker: Restless ghost
lines.text: Release! Thank you stranger..

sections.title: Searching the coffin after the quest
